children.title: ${'即将恢复(1天内):\n'+dataList.filter(item=>{if(item.is_disabled==='1')return false;if(item.codex_auth_status==='need_relogin')return false;if(!item.codex_usage_reset_at)return false;const ts=+item.codex_usage_reset_at;if(ts!==ts||ts<=0)return false;const resetDate=new Date(ts*1000);const now=new Date();const diffDays=(resetDate-now)/(1000*60*60*24);return diffDays>=0&&diffDays<=1;}).map(item=>{const d=new Date(+item.codex_usage_reset_at*1000);const mm=String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0');const dd=String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');const hh=String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0');const mi=String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');return '#'+(item.order_index||'')+' '+item.email_name.split('@')[0]+' ('+mm+'-'+dd+' '+hh+':'+mi+')';}).join('\n')}

children.children: ${'即将恢复 '+dataList.filter(item=>{if(item.is_disabled==='1')return false;if(item.codex_auth_status==='need_relogin')return false;if(!item.codex_usage_reset_at)return false;const ts=+item.codex_usage_reset_at;if(ts!==ts||ts<=0)return false;const resetDate=new Date(ts*1000);const now=new Date();const diffDays=(resetDate-now)/(1000*60*60*24);return diffDays>=0&&diffDays<=1;}).length}

children.title: ${(()=>{const future=dataList.filter(item=>{if(item.is_disabled==='1')return false;if(item.codex_auth_status==='need_relogin')return false;if(!item.codex_usage_reset_at)return false;const ts=+item.codex_usage_reset_at;if(ts!==ts||ts<=0)return false;return new Date(ts*1000)>new Date();});if(future.length===0)return'无';const groups={};future.forEach(item=>{const d=new Date(+item.codex_usage_reset_at*1000);const key=(d.getMonth()+1)+'.'+String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');if(!groups[key])groups[key]=0;groups[key]++;});return Object.keys(groups).sort((a,b)=>{const [am,ad]=a.split('.').map(Number);const [bm,bd]=b.split('.').map(Number);return am*100+ad-(bm*100+bd);}).map(day=>day+' 恢复 '+groups[day]+' 个').join('\n');})()}

children.children: ${(()=>{const future=dataList.filter(item=>{if(item.is_disabled==='1')return false;if(item.codex_auth_status==='need_relogin')return false;if(!item.codex_usage_reset_at)return false;const ts=+item.codex_usage_reset_at;if(ts!==ts||ts<=0)return false;return new Date(ts*1000)>new Date();});const groups={};future.forEach(item=>{const d=new Date(+item.codex_usage_reset_at*1000);const key=(d.getMonth()+1)+'.'+String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');if(!groups[key])groups[key]=0;groups[key]++;});const days=Object.keys(groups).sort((a,b)=>{const [am,ad]=a.split('.').map(Number);const [bm,bd]=b.split('.').map(Number);return am*100+ad-(bm*100+bd);});return days.length>0?(days[0]+'~'+days[days.length-1]+' '+future.length+'个'):('恢复 '+future.length);})()}

children.title: ${'已过期重置日:\n'+dataList.filter(item=>{if(item.is_disabled==='1')return false;if(item.codex_auth_status==='need_relogin')return false;if(!item.codex_usage_reset_at)return false;const ts=+item.codex_usage_reset_at;if(ts!==ts||ts<=0)return false;return new Date(ts*1000)<new Date();}).map(item=>{const d=new Date(+item.codex_usage_reset_at*1000);const mm=String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0');const dd=String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');const hh=String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0');const mi=String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');return '#'+(item.order_index||'')+' '+item.email_name.split('@')[0]+' ('+mm+'-'+dd+' '+hh+':'+mi+')';}).join('\n')}

children.children: ${'已过期 '+dataList.filter(item=>{if(item.is_disabled==='1')return false;if(item.codex_auth_status==='need_relogin')return false;if(!item.codex_usage_reset_at)return false;const ts=+item.codex_usage_reset_at;if(ts!==ts||ts<=0)return false;return new Date(ts*1000)<new Date();}).length}

confirm.title: 批量刷新用量
confirm.description: ${'将随机刷新 '+Math.min(10,dataList.filter(function(item){if(item.is_disabled==='1')return false;if(!item.codex_access_token||!item.codex_account_id)return false;if(!item.codex_usage_reset_at)return false;var ts=+item.codex_usage_reset_at;if(ts!==ts||ts<=0)return false;var diff=(new Date(ts*1000)-new Date())/(1000*60*60*24);return diff<=4;}).length)+' 个未来4天到期邮箱的用量，确认吗？'}

data.email_name_list: ${(()=>{var list=dataList.filter(function(item){if(item.is_disabled==='1')return false;if(!item.codex_access_token||!item.codex_account_id)return false;if(!item.codex_usage_reset_at)return false;var ts=+item.codex_usage_reset_at;if(ts!==ts||ts<=0)return false;var diff=(new Date(ts*1000)-new Date())/(1000*60*60*24);return diff<=4;}).map(function(item){return item.email_name;});for(var i=list.length-1;i>0;i--){var j=Math.floor(Math.random()*(i+1));var tmp=list[i];list[i]=list[j];list[j]=tmp;}return list.slice(0,10);})()}

confirm.title: 确认删除吗？

value.parseResult: ${(()=>{const raw=String(getFormValue('mail-account-import-form','raw_input')||'').replace(/\r/g,'');const lines=raw.split('\n').map(item=>String(item||'').trim()).filter(Boolean);const valid_list=[];const error_list=[];const duplicate_in_batch_list=[];const seen=new Set();const quoteSql=(value)=>"'"+String(value).replace(/'/g,"''")+"'";lines.forEach((line,index)=>{const parts=line.split('----');if(parts.length<4){error_list.push({order_index:index+1,email_name:'',raw_text:line,error_msg:'格式错误，至少需要4段'});return;}const email_name=String(parts[0]||'').trim();const password=String(parts[1]||'').trim();const guid_code=String(parts[2]||'').trim();const recovery_code=parts.slice(3).join('----').trim();if(!email_name||!password||!guid_code||!recovery_code){error_list.push({order_index:index+1,email_name,raw_text:line,error_msg:'字段不能为空'});return;}if(!/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(email_name)){error_list.push({order_index:index+1,email_name,raw_text:line,error_msg:'邮箱格式不正确'});return;}const dedupeKey=email_name.toLowerCase();const emailPrefix=email_name.includes('@')?email_name.split('@')[0]:email_name;const row={order_index:index+1,email_name,password,guid_code,recovery_code,proton_registered:'0',proton_email:emailPrefix?emailPrefix+'@proton.me':'',proton_password:'Zhangzhi@888',raw_text:line};if(seen.has(dedupeKey)){duplicate_in_batch_list.push(Object.assign({error_msg:'同批邮箱重复'},row));return;}seen.add(dedupeKey);valid_list.push(row);});return {total_line_count:lines.length,valid_count:valid_list.length,error_count:error_list.length,duplicate_count:duplicate_in_batch_list.length,valid_list,error_list,duplicate_in_batch_list,email_name_list_sql:valid_list.map(item=>quoteSql(item.email_name)).join(',')};})()}
